name: Banana Cookie Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Fold the mashed bananas and chopped cookies into the vanilla ice cream in a large bowl.
2. Pour the mixture into an 8-inch square pan.
3. Drizzle with chocolate syrup.
4. Use a knife to make swirls in the mix.
5. Cover the pan and freeze until firm.
6. To serve, scoop the ice cream into sundae glasses.
7. Top with additional chocolate sauce, banana slices, and maraschino cherries.
